reviews.review_description:
Nice little school project, that's about it. The two 'five star' ratings are obviously from the developer/friends

You can't even grip the racquet properly. Check out First Person Tennis or even Matchpoint tennis if you want tennis in VR.
Finally a great VR tennis game. Ultra realistic but still very fun!
Whenever I hit the ball it just goes through the racket 😤😤😤
It's hard to hit it goes through the net.

If you’re looking for a tennis game to play in VR, this is not it. There are so many better options through app lab that make the physics a million times better and the overall experience more enjoyable
As the other comment suggests, this is nothing but a holiday project made by some friends in a few days.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. Yes, it is a hobby project made by me. Yes there are much better tennis VR games out there than this one. But the goal of this one is not to be the best realistic tennis game available and it will never be. Its a tennis simulator thing, which will be clear with upcoming updates like physic items (faster/bigger ball, effects and more).
